name: Almost reversi
short_description: This is a board game that combines deck building and Reversi. Buy powerful stones from the store and try to win 12 times within your time limit of 12 minutes!
detailed_description:
This is a board game that combines deck building and Reversi.
Players can win by purchasing stones with special abilities from the store, building a deck, and defeating 12 opponents within 12 minutes.

Features

Stones with special abilities allow you to make powerful moves that defy the traditional Reversi rules!
"Your opponents will also use special abilities to corner you!
Buy key chains that activate abilities under certain conditions to get an advantage in the game."
The opponent AI in the second half of the game is pretty strong!

supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
